prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - maximize carbohydrate intake with strategic timing around 20km training run scheduled for 10:00 AM

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes pre-workout (within 2 hours of 10:00 AM), during-workout (if run exceeds 90 minutes), and post-workout nutrition (within 30 minutes after run)
Carbohydrate content is elevated and appropriately distributed across meals, with emphasis on easily digestible carbs around training window
All meals are vegetarian and nut-free
Plan is presented as a single day schedule with specific meal times and portion sizes
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a marathon runner requiring high carbohydrate intake and specific timing around training, including pre-workout, during-workout, and post-workout nutrition needs
